prose.en: Providers MUST demonstrate continuous progress towards a FedRAMP Certification, documented in their Trust Center or website and updated at least quarterly; progress is measured by the provider against documented goals and milestones.

https://ns.fedramp.gov/cr26/facet/narrat.note: This is an opportunity for a business to showcase its goals and progress, and should be seen as a marketing and customer experience challenge instead of a compliance challenge.
